ddls:
CREATE TABLE "driver_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the driver interface */,
  "eType" TEXT /* Type of the driver interface */,
  "uiId" INTEGER /* User interface identifier associated with the driver */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Globally Unique Identifier for the driver interface */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver interface */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated hardware configuration */,
  "driver_type" TEXT /* Type of the driver (e.g., graphics, input) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interface was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric record */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver interface */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of times the interface has been called */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total execution time in milliseconds for the interface calls */,
  "average_time" INTEGER /* Average execution time in milliseconds */,
  "min_time" INTEGER /* Minimum execution time in milliseconds */,
  "max_time" INTEGER /* Maximum execution time in milliseconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated hardware configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES driver_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver interface being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES driver_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interface version */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver interface */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the interface */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the interface version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_versions_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES driver_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver interface where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated hardware configuration */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES driver_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report contents */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs who have access to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity changed (e.g., driver_interface, performance_metric) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the change request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES driver_interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
